calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Jennifer Riso, Esq. for Plaintiff: Aussy Manuhu, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Davis Shayne Hast and Damon Lee McFadden.
Proposed Judgment received in court, amount requested as follows:
Back-rent Damages $12,400.00
Attorney's Fees $4,927.50
Costs $827.71, for a total of $21,058.36
Matter is submitted and taken under submission for review.
